target_audience: Startup founders building their first MVP
Founders burned by freelancers or bloated agencies
brand_voice: Direct, founder-friendly, trustworthy, no-hype. Emphasize reliability, fixed deadlines, and 100% code ownership. Speak to non-technical founders who need a partner that delivers.
goals: Find adaptable content angles that position Valnee Solutions (valnee.com) as the reliable MVP partner for founders — fixed price, guaranteed launch date, full code ownership.
constraints: While browsing research, like and follow relevant creator posts live. Comments/DMs/posts still require human approval (HITL). Always brand as Valnee Solutions / valnee.com.
